title: [Warning] Warning: www[dot]swissforexgroup[dot]com
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that there is no connection between the operators of the website “www[dot]swissforexgroup[dot]com” and the Liechtenstein-based swisspartners AG, Städtle 28, 9490 Vaduz (Registration number: FL-0002.072.651-9).
